title: AUDIENCE-ASK — sunset walk: where is Ginger's island?
prompt: Wide cinematic golden-hour shot on @beach-sunset — soft golden light pouring across the wet sand at the gentle calm tide line, the sun half-set on the horizon, soft pastel pinks and oranges in the sky, gentle calm surf rolling in slowly. Three figures already walking together at a slow gentle pace along the wet shore in soft foreground partial-silhouette. @Papa already CENTER-FRAME walking gently with both feet alternating on the wet sand. Papa has exactly two arms and two hands visible — his right hand gently held by Sara's hand, his left hand gently held by Eva's hand. @Sara already on the RIGHT walking gently beside Papa with both feet alternating on the wet sand, her left hand gently held in Papa's right hand. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible. @Eva already on the LEFT walking gently beside Papa with both feet alternating on the wet sand, her right hand gently held in Papa's left hand. Curly blonde hair with rainbow bow. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) The three of them stroll gently along the wet shore, gentle small soft surf lapping at their feet. Papa looks calmly out at the horizon. (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Sara turns her head DIRECTLY toward the camera with a warm friend-to-friend wonder-sparkle in her eyes. Sara (gentle warm thoughtful voice, friend-to-friend energy): "Where do YOU think Ginger's island is?" She holds her warm look at the camera waiting cheerfully for the kid watching at home to call out a guess. Calm cheerful kid-show ocean ambiance throughout — gentle surf, soft seabirds. STRICT ANATOMY: Papa has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Each character stays grounded with feet on the wet sand throughout, walking gently — no running, no leaping, no jumping. The sand and water stay plain clean — no marks, no red, no debris.
